_doc: Objective corrections to capability flags when LiteLLM is wrong or missing. Keyed by model id; shallow-merged into that model's `capabilities` object and flips `source` to `patch`. Recognized flags: function_calling, vision, prompt_caching, reasoning, response_schema, audio_input, audio_output, web_search.

_example_remove_underscore_to_use._note: why this correction exists + source link
